name: codex-loop
description: Design, validate, publish, and safely operate versioned Codex Loops from any Codex task.

interface.shortDescription: Design and operate verified Codex Loops.
interface.longDescription: Create and refine versioned multi-agent Loops conversationally, discover authenticated capabilities without exposing credentials, and inspect or control runs through explicit safety boundaries.
defaultPrompt: Use $design-loop to create a verified Loop for this task.
Use $operate-loop to inspect this Loop's current run.
